$comment: C11/C23 6.7.5 (D-CSUBSET-ALIGNAS): a struct MEMBER alignas(16)/alignas(8) raises the composite alignment + size + a following field's offset, END-TO-END via the interner's fieldAligns → computeLayout. exit = _Alignof(S)16 + sizeof(S)16 + offsetof(T,i)8 + 2 = 42. All values are data-model-independent, so the one exit code holds across all four targets (incl. the shipped release pipeline).
